name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-wedata

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-wedata
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Wedata SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Wedata SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-wedata
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common wedata
```

documentation:
> ``` > param _ProjectId > > 项目id > > type ProjectId > > str > > param _MakeName > > 补录计划名称 > > type MakeName > > str > > param _TaskIdList > > 补录任务集合 > > type TaskIdList > > list of str > > param _MakeDatetimeList > > 补录计划日期范围 > > type MakeDatetimeList > > list of CreateMakeDatetimeInfo > > param _ProjectIdent > > 项目标识 > > type ProjectIdent > > str > > param _CheckParent > > 补录是否检查父任务状态，默认不检查。不推荐使用，后续会废弃，推荐使用 CheckParentType。 > > type CheckParent > > bool > > param _CheckParentType > > 补录检查父任务类型。取值范围： > ``` \
  • NONE: 全部不检查 \
    • \
  • ALL: 检查全部上游父任务 \

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.DelayTime
documentation:
执行时间，单位分钟，天/周/月/年调度才有。比如天调度，每天的02:00点执行一次，delayTime就是120分钟
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.StartupTime
documentation:
启动时间
\:rtype: int

documentation:
自依赖类型  1:有序串行 一次一个 排队, 2: 无序串行 一次一个 不排队， 3:并行 一次多个
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.StartTime
documentation:
生效开始时间，格式 yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.EndTime
documentation:
生效结束时间，格式 yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.TaskAction
documentation:
调度配置-弹性周期配置，小时/周/月/年调度才有，小时任务指定每天的0点3点4点跑，则为'0,3,4'。
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.CycleType
documentation:
"周期类型  0:crontab类型, 1:分钟，2:小时，3:天，4:周，5:月，6:一次性，7:用户驱动，10:弹性周期 周,11:弹性周期 月,12:年,13:即时触发Instant类型，与正常周期调度任务逻辑隔离
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.CycleStep
documentation:
步长，间隔时间，最小1
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.CrontabExpression
documentation:
cron表达式  周期类型为crontab调度才需要
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.ExecutionStartTime
documentation:
执行时间左闭区间，格式：HH:mm  小时调度才有，例如小时任务, 每日固定区间生效
\:rtype: str

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.ExecutionEndTime
documentation:

新的任务名
\:rtype: str

失败重试间隔,单位分钟，创建任务的时候已经给了默认值
\:rtype: int

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.TryLimit

methods.name: tencentcloud.wedata.v20210820.models.ModifyTaskInfoRequest.RunPriority
